instruction: Fix normalize_cache_key(value) to accept only strings and return lowercase ASCII alphanumeric segments separated by one hyphen. Treat runs of whitespace, underscores, or hyphens as separators, remove every other character including non-ASCII text, collapse separators, strip edge separators, and raise ValueError for non-string input.
acceptance_criteria: normalize_cache_key lowercases ASCII letters and preserves digits
normalize_cache_key collapses whitespace, underscore, and hyphen separator runs
normalize_cache_key removes punctuation and non-ASCII characters
normalize_cache_key strips edge separators and handles empty normalized output
normalize_cache_key raises ValueError for non-string input

verifiers.name: case-and-digits
verifiers.criterion: normalize_cache_key lowercases ASCII letters and preserves digits

verifiers.name: separator-runs
verifiers.criterion: normalize_cache_key collapses whitespace, underscore, and hyphen separator runs

verifiers.name: filtered-characters
verifiers.criterion: normalize_cache_key removes punctuation and non-ASCII characters

verifiers.name: edges
verifiers.criterion: normalize_cache_key strips edge separators and handles empty normalized output

verifiers.name: types
verifiers.criterion: normalize_cache_key raises ValueError for non-string input
